name: Hot Cherry Fruit Compote
recipeInstructions:
1. In a buttered, large glass baking dish (9 X 13 or larger), arrange Bing cherries, Royal Ann cherries, peach slices, pineapple chunks, Mandarin orange sections, raisins, and ginger.
2. Sprinkle the grated lemon rind over all the ingredients.
3. Make a paste of the melted butter, brown sugar, and curry powder (if using).
4. Distribute this mixture evenly over the fruit.
5. Cover with cherry pie filling.
6. Pour rum over the top.
7. Bake in an oven preheated to 350°F for 45 minutes, or until hot and bubbly.
8. Serve hot as an accompaniment to meat or poultry, or chilled as a dessert.
